extendedQueries.sql: SELECT users_t.id, users_t.email, users_t.name, users_t.avatar_url AS "avatarUrl", users_t.role, users_t.status, users_t.is_deleted AS "isDeleted", users_t.metadata, users_t.tags, users_t."lastLoginAt", users_t."createdAt", users_t."updatedAt" FROM "users" users_t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tasks assignedtasks_0 WHERE assignedtasks_0."assigneeId" = users_t.id AND assignedtasks_0.status = ?) ORDER BY users_t.id ASC

AND (`main`.`users`.`id`) = (`t0`.`assigneeId`) AND `t0`.`assigneeId` IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY `main`.`users`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
